rationale: Title '2025 Revenue ($M)' is correct, bars match 8.2/9.1/11.4/14.0 with proportional heights, blue rounded-top bars, thin baseline, and muted gray Q1-Q4 labels as briefed. The filmstrip shows the full choreography: title fades in first, bars grow with a visible left-to-right stagger (mid-build tile reads 5.8/4.7/2.7/0) while value labels count up and ride the bar tops, then a hold and a unified fade-out (final still shows only a faint ghost at the very last frame). Spacing is consistent, labels are centered on bars, nothing clips or overlaps, and typography is bold, legible, and broadcast-clean against the #0B0E14 background. Only nitpick is the last sampled frame retains a barely visible residue of the fade, which is negligible.
